title: Lexi's Modern Tekkit
description: Modern and lightweight approach to Tekkit Classic in the modern versions of Minecraft!
body:
I remembered playing Tekkit Classic in my childhood and watching YouTube videos about it. This made me want to play it again, but in modern Minecraft. So I created this modpack.

Lexi's Modern Tekkit aims to recreate the Tekkit experience, in the modern era of Minecraft, in specific, Tekkit Classic. Tekkit Classic is a lightweight technic modpack based on a much older version of Minecraft. Main parts of it were IndustrialCraft 2 and BuildCraft. 

LMT uses the modern equivalents of these mods such as Tech Reborn for IC2 or Simple Pipes for Buildcraft.

The goals in this modpack are the same as in Tekkit Classic: Build and automate factories, production and make your progression easier as you find better resources and build better machines. There is no questing system like it also was in the original.


Currently there are **16** mods included in the newest version.

For any questions, mod requests, updates, bug reports and more information, contact me on Discord: **thecowempress** .
